phase_summary: The scorecard holds at 3 supportive · 3 neutral · 2 headwind — net +1 — with conviction weakening as Risk Off pressure builds. June payrolls undershot at +57K (unemployment 4.2%) and ADP missed at +98K, yet the two headwinds held: the dollar's post-NFP spike to 101.41 reversed only to 100.82 and real yields firmed to 2.26%. Stablecoin dominance easing to 13.9% (now supportive) and TOTAL recovering to $2.21T kept BTC.D firm at 55.5% and the dial in BTC Accumulation.
_score_note: score (0-100) sets the pointer position on the gradient bar. Matches macropulse.uk dialStates pointer values: Risk Off~8, Hold~33, BTC Accumulation~58, ALT Rotation~82, Take Profit~95.
_note: active_zone must match one of _zones exactly. The email renders a gradient bar (Sell→Hold→Buy BTC→Alt Season→Top) matching the website design.
